title: More Wizards [More Magic Series]
description: Play as a soul or lightning wizard!
body:
# 📦 Installation
## Required
- **AzureLib Armor**
- **Runes**
- **Spell Engine**
- **Spell Power Attributes**
## Strongly recommended
- **Better Combat** for proper weapon mechanics
- **Wizards** want to see more wizards? Go and check out is amazing work!
- **The Ancient Trinkets Index** - powerfull trinkets to aid you!
- **The Cursed Trinkets Index** - more trinkets more fun!
- **The Great Alchemical Compendium** - potions that grants powerfull bonus but only for a limited time!
# ✨ Features
This mod 2 new playable classes to the game, to compliment the role play experience.

## Lightning & Soul Spell Books
Craft a Spell Binding Table (just don't forget bookshelves around the Spell Binding Table).

To unlock Lightning spells, create the Lightning Spell Book on the Spell Binding Table!

To unlock Soul spells, create the Soul Spell Book on the Spell Binding Table!

## Explore the armory
Explore new, craftable, lightning wizard and soul wizard equipment, with bonuses to boost spell damage.

![Display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07f55e7adda8eac54fed18c8f53703024272f808.png)

Lightning Wizard: new 2 armor sets, Lightning Staves.

Soul Wizard: new 2 armor sets, Soul Staves.

# 🔧 Configuration
**Item bonuses:**
- config/more_wizards/item_v3

 

# Special thanks to:
- Count_Sjorn_Paradox for the help in making the armors models!
